name: Sloppy Joes 2 (Vegan)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups TVP® granules or flakes mixed
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute garlic, onion, and green bell pepper in a skillet until softened.
2. Add the TVP® granules or flakes mixed with hot water to the skillet and stir until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, mix tomato paste, remaining water, oregano, catsup, cayenne pepper, Worcestershire sauce, honey (if using), salt (if desired) until well blended.
4. Pour the sauce mixture into the skillet with the TVP® ingredients and stir to combine.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for a few minutes until thickened but still spreadable.
6. Toast rolls if desired.
7. Spoon the sauce over the bottom half of each roll, top with shredded lettuce, and serve.
